title: pilosella tephrochlorella
intro: Pilosella tephrochlorella, also known as False Sow Thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella tephrochlorella are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Pilosella tephrochlorella can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
